sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94509" key="skalhni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκᾰλην-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n94509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unevenness</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σχημάτων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.697a</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
